visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand inside a large warehouse store aisle. The woman on the left has long black hair and wears a white lace top. The woman on the right wears a dark purple off-shoulder top and a dark beret. They are both holding large, square plush pillows with cat faces. Behind them, industrial-style shelves are filled with boxes. A red and blue Costco logo is prominently displayed at the top. (2) The scene cuts to a medium shot as the women rotate the pillows to show their triangular shape. One pillow is pink with a cat/rabbit face, another is white with a brown cat face, and a third bear-shaped pillow sits on a box behind them. They point at the soft texture of the fabric. Yellow and red variety-style text overlays appear to emphasize the price and cuteness. (3) The woman on the right sits on a low surface to demonstrate using the triangular pillow as a lumbar support and armrest. She smiles and gestures towards her lower back to show the positioning. The background remains the brightly lit, open warehouse space. (4) The camera returns to a standing medium shot of both women. They hold the pillows close to their faces and smile. Subtitles in Traditional Chinese continue to scroll at the bottom of the screen. The lighting is consistent, bright industrial white light throughout.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Slogan]: 429元小巧實用. [Variety]: 最可愛的 三角靠墊. (3) [Subtitle]: 比爾要跟大家推薦這. (4) [Subtitle]: 它有什麼圖案. (5) [Subtitle]: 有熊熊 兔兔跟貓貓. (6) [Subtitle]: 429元. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為它是做三角的. (8) [Subtitle]: 你看這是我一個 成人女性的這寬度. (9) [Subtitle]: 所以我覺得 放車上也很適合. (10) [Variety]: 100分靠腰. [Subtitle]: 很適合在沙發上滑手機. (11) [Subtitle]: 你的手肘就有一個支撐點. (12) [Subtitle]: 棉絨的. (13) [Subtitle]: 我真的覺得貓咪 這圖案做得很好看. (14) [Subtitle]: 而且還是藍色的眼睛 好可愛啊.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators demonstrating products in the foreground.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with long dark hair in a white lace dress, the other in a purple top and a beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse interior with high ceilings, metal shelving units, and large cardboard shipping boxes for pillows.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female narration begins with a fast speech rate and high pitch contour, introducing a product. Background music is a bright, rhythmic electronic pop track with a strong synth bass beat. Faint indoor warehouse resonance is audible. (2) A second female voice joins in a casual dialogue style. They discuss different animal patterns, with the sound of plush fabric rustling as they handle the pillows. The music remains a consistent bed throughout. (3) The primary speaker explains the practical usage of the pillow. Her tone is professional yet friendly, with clear articulation. The acoustic floor is dominated by the voices and the BGM, with very little external noise interference. (4) The two voices overlap slightly in a cheerful outro, accompanied by a final rhythmic sequence of the background music. A faint metallic thud from a nearby object in the store occurs near the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> Practical Usage -> Closing Summary.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and recommend the triangular animal-themed lumbar pillows available at Costco by highlighting their cute designs, affordable price, and practical comfort.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the Costco logo and mention of the product price and brand location.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Typical high-energy social media shopping recommendation video using popular editing styles and enthusiastic hosts.
